'''chozhalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactionary|reactionary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactionary|reactionary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chozhalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhalithi|chozhalithi]] || [[word:chozhaliji|chozhaliji]] || [[word:chozhalishi|chozhalishi]] || [[word:chozhaliki|chozhaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhaluthuthu|chozhaluthuthu]] || [[word:chozhalujuju|chozhalujuju]] || [[word:chozhalushushu|chozhalushushu]] || [[word:chozhalukuku|chozhalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhaluthu|chozhaluthu]] || [[word:chozhaluju|chozhaluju]] || [[word:chozhalushu|chozhalushu]] || [[word:chozhaluku|chozhaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhalufthuf|chozhalufthuf]] || [[word:chozhalufjuf|chozhalufjuf]] || [[word:chozhalufshuf|chozhalufshuf]] || [[word:chozhalufkuf|chozhalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhalethe|chozhalethe]] || [[word:chozhaleje|chozhaleje]] || [[word:chozhaleshe|chozhaleshe]] || [[word:chozhaleke|chozhaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhalothotho|chozhalothotho]] || [[word:chozhalojojo|chozhalojojo]] || [[word:chozhaloshosho|chozhaloshosho]] || [[word:chozhalokoko|chozhalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhalotho|chozhalotho]] || [[word:chozhalojo|chozhalojo]] || [[word:chozhalosho|chozhalosho]] || [[word:chozhaloko|chozhaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhalofthof|chozhalofthof]] || [[word:chozhalofjof|chozhalofjof]] || [[word:chozhalofshof|chozhalofshof]] || [[word:chozhalofkof|chozhalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf|chozhalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozhalĂŠthĂŠ|chozhalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhalĂŠjĂŠ|chozhalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhalĂŠshĂŠ|chozhalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chozhalĂŠkĂŠ|chozhalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozhalathatha|chozhalathatha]] || [[word:chozhalajaja|chozhalajaja]] || [[word:chozhalashasha|chozhalashasha]] || [[word:chozhalakaka|chozhalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozhalatha|chozhalatha]] || [[word:chozhalaja|chozhalaja]] || [[word:chozhalasha|chozhalasha]] || [[word:chozhalaka|chozhalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozhalafthaf|chozhalafthaf]] || [[word:chozhalafjaf|chozhalafjaf]] || [[word:chozhalafshaf|chozhalafshaf]] || [[word:chozhalafkaf|chozhalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chozhalasha|chozhalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhalshĂ«sha|chozhalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhalrosha|chozhalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhalmusha|chozhalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhalyasha|chozhalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhalnkshĂ«sha|gochozhalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhalnkrosha|gochozhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhalnkmusha|gochozhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhalnkyasha|gochozhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chozhazhalasha|chozhazhalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhazhalshĂ«sha|chozhazhalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhazhalrosha|chozhazhalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhazhalmusha|chozhazhalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhazhalyasha|chozhazhalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhazhalnkshĂ«sha|gochozhazhalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhazhalnkrosha|gochozhazhalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhazhalnkmusha|gochozhazhalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhazhalnkyasha|gochozhazhalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chezhĂŠlasha|chezhĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chezhĂŠlshĂ«sha|chezhĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chezhĂŠlrosha|chezhĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chezhĂŠlmusha|chezhĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chezhĂŠlyasha|chezhĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gochezhĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠlnkrosha|gochezhĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠlnkmusha|gochezhĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochezhĂŠlnkyasha|gochezhĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chozhfalasha|chozhfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozhfalshĂ«sha|chozhfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozhfalrosha|chozhfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozhfalmusha|chozhfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozhfalyasha|chozhfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozhfalnkshĂ«sha|gochozhfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozhfalnkrosha|gochozhfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozhfalnkmusha|gochozhfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozhfalnkyasha|gochozhfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
